visualizations.title: Decimal-Percentage Shift Rules
visualizations.description: A quick visual guide showing the direction of the decimal point jump.

steps.explanation: To go from decimal to percent, multiply by 100 (move decimal 2 places right).
To go from percent to decimal, divide by 100 (move decimal 2 places left).

visualizations.title: Decimal Hop Animation
visualizations.description: Watch the decimal point shift two places to perform the conversions.
